results.title: Personal blog
results.description: Made this feature-rich blog to learn and exercise my skills about storing data optimally, authentication flow, reusable components, RXJS, and as end-goal to showcase my projects and my thoughts about anything really.

results.title: Twitch chat bot
results.description: My longest standing project so far, includes Tkinter, OAuth & a Plugin system! I personally use this software when I stream - I can read the chat, make changes using the Twitch API, and have fun with viewers using the plugins I made!
